title: aster alberti
intro: Aster alberti, also known as Albert's aster, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aster alberti include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. Aster alberti can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots and leaves can be used to make medicinal preparations.
